---
title: "Methods and Techniques of Sampling"
description: "Basic theory and identification of ACF and PACF chart patterns, as well as ARIMA time series types."
notes: "Εργασία εξαμήνου"
img: "../assets/images/sampling_asgn.jpg"
imgAlt: "Sampling Assignment Cover"
docPages: "140 pages"
year: "June, 2023"
previewText: "Preview"
codeText: "Code"
links:
  - url: https://app.box.com/s/pw4d28rtazztgugx6s8j4vqxo92gkltd
    icon: bi-binoculars
    text: Preview

format: html
order: 1
---
